reviews.title: Comfort

Like the comet of the watch band.

reviews.title: Great watch for a great price
reviews.text: I was skeptical about the watch as I had purchased other watches only to have them fail miserably. This watch turned out great. The most important thing to do is read the manual. Especially about how to wear the watch, which is a little higher than a normal watch. This will make the accuracy much better. The step counter is controlled by arm movement not actual steps, so if you walk stiff armed , it will be inaccurate. Move your arms when walking , the watch will be much more accurate.Make sure you go into the app on your phone and activate the exercises your interested in. This will help the watch to track it better. Also activate the media part of the app for sms,email etc. You can also monitor who is calling you, so you can choose to answer you phone or not. I am extremely pleased with my purchase and will be watching for other products from this company.

reviews.title: Loved it..: til it burned me!
reviews.text: I loved it until I woke up with a burn!!

reviews.title: As advertised
reviews.text: Great watch! Exactly what I wanted (a watch to count steps and that is easy to read). The set up was fairly easy - I received the watch in the early evening and had it set up within half an hour ( I am in my seventies). This is my 3rd watch - first was very expensive and too invasive - second watch cost twice as much as this one and quit charging in the second week - third times a charm.

reviews.title: Hard to set up.
reviews.text: Very difficult to program. I will be sending it back.

reviews.title: There were very little instructions on how to use/set up the watch.  Had to go online to search.
reviews.text: Face of watch is good, and seems like good quality.  Plus I like that it is a touch screen/can swipe.

reviews.title: DO NOT BUY worked less than 60 days and no customer support.
reviews.text:
DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY. YOU WILL REGRET IT!!!!
UPDATE: Less than 60 days and the watched completely stopped working.
Being new to using a smart watch I didn't want to invest a fortune. Read lots of reviews and decided to give this one a try. It is perfect. It does everything I want it to do. It looks great. It is simple to set it up as you want. AND they provided exceptional customer service!

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: This watch has never worked and the instructions did not help.

reviews.title: There are TWO ways of rating this... Garbage or almost garbage.
reviews.text:
There are two ways of rating purchases... either an overall evaluation IRREGARDLESS of the price OR... CONSIDERING THE PRICE. Considering I paid $20 for it... not horrible. BUT here are the SERIOUS flaws so far:

-The Blood Pressure monitor is a COMPLETE JOKE. "Inaccurate" is NOT the word. I tried it on several friends and coworkers. Garbage!
-You are supposed to be able to make a gesture of bringing your wrist up to view the watch and then it is supposed to turn the screen on so that you can read it. ALMOST NEVER! No matter HOW I make the gesture the only thing that works is a PAINFUL twist/shake of my wrist and then it's not guaranteed. I just use the button instead which kind of defeats the purpose.
-BUT THEN, when sleeping.... EVERY DAMNED MOVEMENT I MAKE it turns on... and waking up my wife, because it is like having a flashlight shone in your face!!!!!!!!!!!

So... EVEN THOUGH this was only $20... SAVE YOUR MONEY FOR SOMETHING THAT ACTUALLY WORKS AND WORKS WELL.

reviews.title: Great Smart Watch!
reviews.text: It is a great dupe of Apple Watch.  I absolutely love it. The greatest attraction is the extended battery time (7 to 10 days). I also like various fitness track features such as step count, heart-beat, workout routine. I could check weather too. Another interesting feature is the multiple watch face options. However I struggled a bit figuring out how to change those watch faces. The watch faces can be changed easily using the APP. I found the questions and answers mentioned on the webpage pretty helpful when figuring out other elements.

reviews.title: Bad watch!
reviews.text: The mobile app works fine! But after five months the watch failed to take a charge!! Try a new charger and the watch still wouldn't take a charge! Now I have a Dead watch! A watch should last longer than five months!!!!!

title: Apple Watch SE (GPS, 40mm) - Silver Aluminum Case with Abyss Blue Sport Band (Renewed)
description: Stay safe, active, and healthy with the Apple Watch SE. The SE sports the same bright LTPO OLED Retina display as the Series 6, giving you a bright screen you can view at a glance, even in bright sunlight. On it, you can view all of your fitness metrics, health stats, and mobile notifications. When it comes to health, the SE's optical heart rate monitor can give you indicators of a possible medical condition with notifications for high or low heart rates, as well as irregular rhythms. Even healthy habits are supported, such as hand-washing detection, which displays a 20-second animated countdown as you scrub. Fitness is a large part of staying healthy, and the Apple Watch SE has a variety of ways to assist you in reaching your goals. Activity Rings displays three rings that correspond to movement, exercise, and standing. Stay mobile throughout the day to hit new personal bests as you close the rings.You can also choose from a variety of workouts, such as running, swimming, yoga, cycling, and more; with the watch recording and tracking their specific metrics. Whether inside or outdoors, the SE can guide you via GPS and even provide continuous elevation updates on screen. As you move, choose from a variety of music, podcasts, and audiobooks to entertain and motivate you. For added fun, share your activity rings with friends and challenge them to 7-day activity competitions. Throughout the day, the Apple Watch SE keeps you connected with the world around you. When paired with your iPhone, you can make calls and send texts directly from your wrist, navigate your surroundings with Maps, buy items with Apple Pay, and use your voice to interact with Siri. Made to last in almost any kind of weather, the Apple Watch SE is water-resistant up to 164'. Use its 32GB of built-in storage for apps, watch faces, music, and more.
features: LEAVE YOUR PHONE IN YOUR POCKET: Apple Watch SE GPS Model lets you call, text, and get directions from your wrist, while leaving your phone in your pocket. It offers multiple connectivity options, including: Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and NFC to suit your needs, whatever they might be.

LARGE RETINA OLED DISPLAY: The SE sports a bright LTPO OLED Retina display, giving you a bright screen you can view at a glance, even in bright sunlight. A variety of watch faces are available for the SE watch, including faces that provide essential information for specific activities.

LOADED WITH FEATURES: When paired with your iPhone, you can make calls and send texts from your wrist, navigate with Maps, buy items with Apple Pay, and use your voice to activate Siri. Made to last in almost any kind of weather, the Apple Watch SE is water-resistant up to 164'.

WORKOUTS THAT DON'T QUIT: Cycling, yoga, swimming, high-intensity interval training...the list goes on. You name it, Apple Watch measures it. Set workout-specific goals, see full summaries when you're done, and track how you're trending over time in the Activity app on your iPhone.

GET LOST IN YOUR MUSIC: With Apple Music on your wrist, you've got 60 million tracks of musical motivation to take you places. You can also catch up on the latest podcasts or listen to an audiobook if that's your thing. Stream everything you need right from your watch, even without your phone.

reviews.title: Great Purchase!
reviews.text: First I was hesitant to buy it, because it says "Renewed." But I was mistaken. THIS WAS A GREAT PURCHASE, and I am happy I made the decision to buy it. Comes nicely packaged, perfectly clean, and actually it looks and feels brand new. The price is really affordable. Want to say this is my first time buying an Apple watch, I have transitioned from Samsung to Apple (phone and watch) and again, I made a great choice and purchase. I DO RECOMMEND THIS PRODUCT!

reviews.title: 5-star product!
reviews.text: You have to love it when a product, even something as simple as a thin piece of plastic, outperforms your expectations. Packaged extremely well with everything you'd possibly need, I had my watch cleaned, prepped and completed in minutes. I will use the Skinomi brand for my iPad, Kindle Fire and Samsung Galaxy S III as soon as their old (non-Skinomi) screen protectors need replacement.

reviews.title: Really impressed
reviews.text: Got this for my Sony LiveView and while I was shocked to see that the installation process was more than other screen protectors (ie cell phone screen protectors), installation was pretty simple. After it dries, you can't even tell a screen protector is on!

reviews.title: It's soft
reviews.text:
Like another reviewer had mentioned, they are soft. I used a rubber squeegee that I've used on countless other screen savers, and it actually damaged the skin. It has permanent "bubbles" (more like dents) in it that will not go away. Other than that, the fit is perfect. And the skin comes very nicely packaged with everything you could ever need, including a bottle of soapy water for the application.

The attention to detail by Skinomi is second to none. The company gets five stars, but I've got to deduct one for the soft material. Skinomi did include a squeegee, but it's too big for use with this skin. Had I cut it down to size and used it, I may not have "dents" now.

reviews.title: Good idea
reviews.text: This is a good idea to protect the screen. If you where to scratch it you could just replace the screen saver.

title: Vowor 4G Smartwatch for Kids with Sim Card, Waterproof Phone Watch with WiFi LBS GPS Tracker Video Chat SOS Camera Alarm Clock Anti Lost Watches Children Boys Girls Birthday Gift Age 3-15 (Black)
description:
Vowor Smart watches 4G for Kids
Kids smartwatch supports 4G/3G/2G Nano sim card with data and voice plans.
GSM Bands:
US: B2/B5
3G Bands (WCDMA):
US: B2/B5
4G Band(FDD TDD):
US:B2/4/5/7/12/17
Note:
1. you need to have voice and data plan to make the kids phone watch works properly 2. The Vowor 4G kids phone watch is NOT compatible with Verizon or Sprint, we recommend T-Mobile, Speedtalk and AT&T. But it is ok if your own's phone (parent's) card is Verizon or Sprint. The Vowor kids smartwatch doesn't support other APP except Leefine.
Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.
Package Included:
1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card
features: 【Vowor 4G Kids Smart watch】: the smartwatch kids 4G has all functions you need: Face-talk (video calling), wifi LBS GPS Tracker, geofencing, Pedometer, Voice chat, Texts, Anti-lost, Class Mode, HD Camera, Historical tracker, Safe zones, Remote monitoring, SOS, alarm clock, low battery notification etc. It is a great gift for your kid 3-15 years old.

【Two-way Calling】: the Vowor 4G kids phone watch supports video calling and voice calling, you can chat with your kids face to face, but also can make a voice call. Make sure your sim card have the plan with Voice & Data: voice plan is for calling, and data plan is for network.

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. You can also set the child's range of activity, if the child leaves the set area, the geofencing feature will alerts you. Accurate activity tracker, built-in speed sensor.

【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. The band strap is made of soft Silicone, it is very comfortable to wear it and it does not scratch the hand. We will provide 1-year warranty, replacements such as band strap or data cords will be send out for free. If you have any problems about our smart watches, Please feel free to contact us first. We will reply you within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Better than my Apple Watch
reviews.text: Got this for the kiddo. He’s 14 and Captain Destructo. This kid literally body slams trees for fun and the best and sturdiest gifts for him last about a week. Two if you’re lucky. We’re never lucky. However, it’s been a while and he wears it nonstop. Get this, it still works. He loves the band and all of the features. The battery life makes my jaw drop. I have to charge my Apple Watch at least once a day. This watch does more and has a battery life that won’t quit. I’d fight him for it but again…he body slams trees. Great purchase, guys. It’s also a smart and inexpensive way to test your kid’s level of responsibility before buying more expensive products and flushing your money.

Download music for phone-free listening, and breeze through checkout lines and select transit systems with Garmin Pay contactless payments (with a supported payment network). reviews.title: Love this watch
reviews.text: Nice looking watch with accurate steps. I love the gps feature where it shows your walk on a true map on the app. Nice visual. Heart rate is very accurate as well. Haven't used music feature as much as I thought I would. Garmin makes a nice watch. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Heart rate way off
reviews.text:
The main thing I bought this for is to monitor heart rate while hiking. Its reading is way off for me - as confirmed by a pulse ox and manually counting. The watch kept telling me my heart rate was over 100 just around the house. I have nsvt but my heart rate generally runs low. So I'm very sensitive when I have palpitations - when this watch kept saying my heart rate was over 95 I wasnt buying it. That brings into question any other readings or parameters.

I find the watch annoying and frustrating to use. The watch face does not interact very well for me. I'm constantly trying to tap it and it wont register so then the screen shuts off. Another annoying thing is it tells you to start moving around when I'm doing housework. I guess you can shut that off but I've really lost interest. Hopefully Garmin can offer some fix for the reading since its past the return date.

The positives - watch is comfortable and I don't wear jewelry. I forget its on. Its a large size so its readable if you have vision issues. I've had no problem with that.

reviews.title: Lightweight and perfect for small wrists
reviews.text: This is a great lightweight fitness tracker.  It has about a 4 day battery life and does a quick recharge.  It has a little learning curve for the activity tracking but it is right up there with my Apple Watch.

title: Apple Watch Series 6 (GPS + Cellular, 40mm) - Graphite Stainless Steel Case with Black Sport Band (Renewed)
description: Monitor even more of your health with the Apple Watch Series 6. The Series 6 adds pulse oximetry to measure your blood's oxygen levels (SpO2) in just 15 seconds, as well as showing you your VO2 Max (maximum oxygen consumption) score. These indicators can provide early warnings to possible respiratory conditions. They are joined by an optical heart rate monitor and the ability to record your own ECG (electrocardiogram). The Series 6 can even detect and help you with healthy habits, such as hand-washing detection, which displays a 20-second animated countdown as you scrub. Fitness is a large part of staying healthy, and the Apple Watch has a variety of ways to assist you in reaching your goals. Activity Rings displays three rings that correspond to movement, exercise, and standing. Stay mobile throughout the day to hit new persol bests as you close the rings. You can also choose from a variety of workouts, such as running, swimming, yoga, cycling, and more; with the watch recording and tracking their specific metrics.Fitness and health metrics can be viewed, customized, and tracked on the Apple Watch's curved watch face that houses an always-on LTPO OLED Reti display. Even in direct sunlight you can view the screen with just a glance. As you move, choose from a variety of music, podcasts, and audiobooks to entertain and motivate you. For added fun, share your activity rings with friends and challenge them to 7-day activity competitions. Throughout the day, the Apple Watch Series 6 keeps you connected with the world around you. When paired with your iPhone, you can make calls and send texts directly from your wrist, vigate your surroundings with Maps, buy items with Apple Pay, and use your voice to interact with Siri. Made to last in almost any kind of weather, the Apple Watch Series 6 is water-resistant up to 164'. Use its 32GB of built-in storage for apps, watch faces, music, and more.
features: GPS + Cellular model lets you call, text, and get directions without your phone
Measure your blood oxygen with an all-new sensor and app
Check your heart rhythm with the ECG app
The Always-On Retina display is 2.5x brighter outdoors when your wrist is down
S6 SiP is up to 20% faster than Series 5
5GHz Wi-Fi and U1 Ultra Wideband chip
Track your daily activity on Apple Watch and see your trends in the Fitness app on iPhone
Measure workouts like running, walking, cycling, yoga, swimming, and dance
Swimproof design
Sync your favorite music, podcasts, and audiobooks

Spend your time moving while Galaxy Watch3 tracks seven popular activities automatically. Get more out of each movement thanks to a built-in run coaching.

reviews.title: Great watch, much better than my old "smart" watch
reviews.text:
I got Moto 360 several years ago when smart watches first came out and it was nice, but annoying. It was tied into everything and kept giving me alerts and so eventually I got tired of it. My wife also had a first generation Samsung Gear watch and that was about the same as the Moto.
Well, fast forward a few years and now my wife, daughter, son and daughter-in-law all have newer smart watches (Apple Watches and Fitbit) and they all love them. It was time to get a new phone, so I got a Samsung S20 FE and then decided to get the Samsung watch. I saw on the reviews that it really works well with Samsung phones and so I decided to get the Watch 3. I was looking at the Watch 2, which had a few less features and then I found the Watch 3 in the 41mm size and then found a refurbished one so I ended up paying about the same for the Watch 3 as I would have for the Watch 2.
I'm very impressed with the watch and really love it. I didn't get the one with a cell phone, it just connects to my phone with bluetooth and/or wifi, but it's really amazing. I get my messages, and can turn off the ones that I don't want and then I also get all the health apps. So, now it tells me to get off my chair and walk around and does EKG and stress tesing and Oxygen levels..
I was concerned that the 41 mm might be too small, but it is a great size for me as you can see from the pic. I have had a Citizen Echo Drive for more than 10 years and it is a little larger, but I like the size of the Watch 3 better.
If you are thinking about getting a watch, this one is a good deal right now and I believe it does work best if you use it with a Samsung phone.

reviews.title: Love the watch, hate the battery.
reviews.text: I don't use the sleep tracking because the watch is bulky and annoying while trying to sleep. The mobile app is ok, constantly running in background.  The battery life sucks, only good for a day and sometimes a day and a half which is to bad because I do love all the things it does. I think I can answer my phone on my watch (still figuring out how) can definitely hang up on unwanted calls and can read messages.  Good pedometer and workout tool. Overall nice watch with crappy battery life.

reviews.title: I like it.

I tried another buckle, cloth band, which was ok, but still a challenge to take on and off of my wrist.  This band is easy to attach to the Fit bit watch, and the length is adjustable (which I think is unusual for a slip-on stretchy band.  I even am ok with the multi color. But there is also a lot of room for expansion.

reviews.title: My Approach S6 -- Near Perfection!
reviews.text: Very pleased with the quality of this band replacement for my Approach S6 band and the ease of installation. Having a buddy helps, but the installation is easily accomplished on your own within a matter of minutes.  The new band is more flexible than the original which, IMHO, is a plus.  What I can't say is that the original band might have stiffened with age.  Who knows and it doesn't matter.  The screwdrivers are also an awesome design -- the handle ends have a hex shape you can stick in your drill if your hands are weak.  The only minuscule minus is that the retainer bar/strap is a tad large as others have stated, but problem solved by reusing the retainer strap from the original band. VERY pleased with this purchase.

title: Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate Monitor, Smart Watch for Men Women, with 1.81" Large Screen, Support Call Dial/Receive, IP65 Waterproof Fitness Watch Sleep Monitor Activity Tracker for iOS Android
description:
2022 New Smart Watch for Men Women, with Large Screen (1.81"), Supports Call Dial / Receive, Heart Rate Monitor and Sleep Tracker, Waterproof Fitness Watch (IP65) Compatible with iOS 9.0 and Android 5.0
Why choose us?

2.Refer the seller's video: how to connect the watch to the phone in action and a demonstration of important features.
★Five-star after-sales:
We are committed to making every family member have a good smart watch experience, If you are not satisfied with the Smart Watch you purchased, feel free to contact us, the professional team is happy to serve you!
Package Included:
1pcs x smart watch dial
1pcs x silicone watch band

Specification:
Color: black, gold, grey
Smartwatch size: 25.5*4*1cm/10.04*1.57*0.39inches.
features: ✅【1.81" LARGE SCREEN & 100+ WATCH FACES】Released in 2022, smart watch for android iOS phones has a large screen （1.81") with 320*385 resolution, which makes the fitness watch stylish and easy to read even under the sun. And the screen lightness is adjustable. And there are four different interface styles （most recommend the gear-shaped one,friendly to fat fingers) and 100+ watch dials without extra charges in the app available for you to choose

✅【AN INDISPENSABLE HEALTH TRACKER】Fitness watch tracks your heart rate in real time (very accurate after multiple trials), records daily steps, calories burned, distance traveled and most importantly your sleep data. It also reminds you to stand up and have a walk after your sit for too long and when it's time to get some water. All this can help you lead a healthier life

✅【BLUETOOTH CONNECTIVITY AND COMPATIBILITY】When the sport watch is connected to the M2 app via Bluetooth, you can control the music player, check weather forecast, control your camera remotely and most importantly receive and make calls. As for compatibility, this smartwatch can work seamlessly with iOS 9.0, Android 5.0 and other higher Bluetooth smartphones. To make it simple to you, if your phone was bought in and after 2016. It can work with our watch in most cases

✅【LONG-LASTING BATTERY AND WATERPROOF】With a large battery(250mAh), the smart watch which is also designed to be durable and long-lasting, can be used for a week or more without charging and it only takes less than 2 hours to get it fully charged with that magnetic fast charger（included）. As for it's waterproof level, it's IP65, which means you don't need to take it off while washing your hands or showering

✅【MULTI-FUNCTIONAL】Fitness Tracker watch is equipped with many other practical functions like alarm, stopwatch, breath training, little games and time format changing. And it can display in 22 different languages. One more user-friendly and thoughful design is its notification settings: silent, vibrate, normal

reviews.title: Impressive watch with features
reviews.text: Watch has many features for fitness and heath I bought 2. Some of the screens are well thought out. Accuracy is a key benefit of this watch. Needed to use newer version of app and works with my android phone. Current version is metric and new version is to have imperial values. Vendor was responsive and resolved questions ASAP. Plan to buy new version with upgrades when available

reviews.title: lastima el software del celular
reviews.text:
Este reloj tiene varias cosas interesantes, pero lastimosamente el software del celular que lo controla tiene muchas fallas, por ejemplo cuando uno agrega una lista de contactos favoritos al reloj, esporadicamente desaparece y hay que volver a crearla. Tambien es frecuente que se desconecta el programa y el reloj, por lo que se dejan de recibir notificaciones en el reloj.

Tambien hay problemas con la personalizacion del skin, donde uno selecciona una foto de fondo, la descarga al reloj y aveces despues de unos minutos u horas desaparece y toca volver a hacer el proceso.

Tambien la aplicacion del celular esta mal diseñada, algunos botones no se ven bien y es dificil encontrar como seguir cuando se quiere configurar el reloj.

Lo bueno del reloj:
- permite recibir y hacer llamadas desde el reloj ya que trae microfono y un pequeño parlante, pero hay que aclarar que necesita al celular cerca y conectado por bluetooth.
- Reporta bien la mayoria de notificaciones que recive el celular, como llegada de SMS, emails, mensajes de whatsapp, aunque no muestra emojins.

-La bateria carga en 90minutos completamente y puede durar 3 dias sin tener que recargar.

En resumen hasta que el fabricante no mejore los problemas de software no es una buena compra este reloj.

title: PlayZoom 2 Kids Smartwatch & Headphones - Video Camera Selfies STEM Learning Educational Fun Games, MP3 Music Player Audio Books Touch Screen Sports Digital Watch Gift for Kids Toddlers Boys Girls
features: 🦄 LEARN AND PLAY: This watch combines learning and fun. Help your child learn about STEM, how to tell time, set an alarm, video record, get active and fit, and more—all through the power of play! Kids will be having too much fun to realize they're learning! Plug the matching headphones into the PlayZoom's headphone jack and listen to your favorite tunes, and listen to lulabies and bed time stories before bed.

🦄 SAFE AND FUN: Unlike other smart technology, our electronic watch is safe for children of any age because we don’t require a credit card, a connection to data or Wi-Fi, or downloading. The watch also features an In Case of Emergency Card on the watch. For your total peace of mind, turn to iTouch.

🦄 COOL CAMERAS: Our kids' wristwatch has a swivel photo camera and video camera. Toddlers and kids alike will love getting creative by taking photos. The watch can hold up to 50 photos that can be saved and uploaded onto your computer via USB.

🦄 RECHARGEABLE BATTERY: Your little one can play all day, and you won't have to swap out pesky watch batteries. With your order, you'll receive a USB charging cable that will have your child's digital toy watch ready to go for another day of fun.

🦄 EXPRESS YOURSELF: These gadgets aren't just great for teaching; they also allow kids to express their unique personalities. Choose from 10+ unique band designs and watch faces! PlayZoom Smartwatches are the perfect gifts for kids of all ages!

reviews.title: Angry customer
reviews.text: So after receiving these items on March 29, 2021, it took 5 hrs to charge, the headphone jack doesn't even fit the watch!  On top of that my daughter plays on it for 15 mins and it dies!  She wore it to play on it and the wrist band broke!  I'm not happy at all and will never be buying this brand ever again!  It wouldn't even turn on right away after charging! The headphones are absolutely the worst thing ever ! I plugged them in to my phone and all we heard was high pitched screeching!  I'm not asking for my money back, I'm just warning others to be careful!  Complete false advertising!
